content_html:
This is a heavily interactive web application, and JavaScript is required. Simple HTML interfaces are possible, but that is not what this is.

Learn more about Bluesky at bsky.social and atproto.com.

Gil Durán

gilduran.com

did:plc:waplkqr2wuy2c4qbge6h6ed4

It's official! I'm *permanently* banned from X for tweeting "TLDR: Fascism." (appeal denied) What an honor—and a sign that the Silicon Valley billionaires feel threatened by my book. (One of my final viral posts featured this cover.) Pre-order here! https://www.simonandschuster.com/books/The-Nerd-Reich/Gil-Duran/9781668221402 [contains quote post or other embedded content]

summary: Gil Durán, posting on Bluesky: It’s official! I’m permanently banned from X for tweeting “TLDR: Fascism.” (appeal denied) “TLDR: Fascism” was Durán’s two-word response to this 1,000-word essay from Palantir describing their vision for a “Technological Republic”. ( Alternative link to essay if you don’t want to visit x.com.) Getting perma-banned from Twitter…
title: X, the Platform of Free Speech
